components.name: log4jdbc-log4j2-jdbc4.1
components.description: A modification of log4jdbc to natively use Log4j 2 (or SLF4J as usual), that supports from JDBC 4.1 to JDBC 3, includes all the improvements of log4jdbc-remix, and provides new improvements on its own.
